title: Mullins' last-second 3 sends UConn to Final Four
content: UConn eliminated No. 1 overall seed Duke from the men's NCAA tournament on Braylon Mullins' 3-pointer with 0.4 seconds left.

title: Eagles GM offers same reply to every Brown query
content: Eagles general manager Howie Roseman had a stock answer for every question about receiver A.J. Brown that he fielded from the local media at the league meetings Sunday, opting for a neutral response amid the ongoing trade speculation.

title: Source: Agreed-to Epenesa-Browns deal now off
content: The Cleveland Browns will not be signing AJ Epenesa, with the team uncomfortable finalizing the deal after the veteran defensive end had his physical, a source told ESPN on Sunday.

title: Sources: NFL set to begin hiring replacement refs
content: NFL owners are "alarmed" by the state of negotiations with the NFL Referees Association and have authorized staff members to begin hiring and onboarding replacement officials in the coming weeks, league sources said Sunday.

title: 'Gap' year? Celts win 50th as Brown jabs doubters
content: The Celtics are headed back to the playoffs thanks to another 50-win season. Not too bad for a "gap" year, according to Jaylen Brown.

title: Pitino lands new deal after leading SJU resurgence
content: Rick Pitino has signed a new deal with St. John's that makes him the second-highest-paid coach in the Big East.

title: Woodland wins Houston by 5 amid PTSD battle
content: Gary Woodland won the Houston Open by five shots Sunday, his first PGA Tour victory since undergoing brain surgery in 2023.

title: Mets fans boo Bichette as early strikeouts mount
content: Bo Bichette heard his first boos from Mets fans as he has struck out eight times in his first three games. "I thought my at-bats were terrible, too," he said.

title: Women's Elite Eight: Previewing Monday's matchups
content: From pregame analysis to postgame keys, we've got you covered for all of Monday's Elite Eight action.

title: How UConn and UCLA clinched a spot in the women's Final Four
content: UCLA rallied to beat Duke and UConn held off Notre Dame as both No. 1 seeds won Sunday in the Elite Eight.

title: Men's March Madness 2026: Ranking the Final Four teams
content: Four teams will play for it all next weekend. Let's rank Michigan, Arizona, Illinois and UConn one final time.

title: Miller's seven-round NFL mock draft: Let's project landing spots for 257 prospects
content: Matt Miller predicted every pick in the 2026 NFL draft, from the Raiders' selection at No. 1 to the Broncos' Mr. Irrelevant slot at the end of Round 7.

title: A historic rookie class? Is Trout back? 10 things we learned from MLB's opening weekend
content: From early trends to the most -- and least -- surprising performances, this is what stood out from baseball's return.

title: Kryptonite for 10 NBA title contenders: Which weaknesses could sink playoff teams?
content: We evaluated every playoff contender's biggest weaknesses, how it will impact the postseason and which team is best positioned to exploit them.

title: NBA playoff watch: East, West leaders meet in OKC
content: Could Pistons-Thunder be a Finals preview? Plus, updated playoff projections, draft lottery standings after Sunday.

title: Future of Giannis and Ja, and the big questions facing every NBA lottery team
content: With 10 NBA teams already eyeing the offseason, Bobby Marks examines each front office's biggest priority.

title: Ranking the top Stanley Cup playoff bandwagons for ousted fans
content: For the 16 fan bases whose team doesn't make it, here's a guide on who they should root for.

title: NHL playoff watch: Are the Penguins and Islanders destined for a first-round matchup?
content: The Metro teams face off Monday -- and maybe again in April. Plus, bracket projections, draft lottery standings.

title: WNBA's CBA: 10 biggest wins from new agreement
content: The CBA permanently and positively changes the WNBA's landscape. These are the wins, biggest strides and areas of compromise.

title: Hyo Joo Kim repeats as Ford champ, tops Nelly Korda again
content: Hyo Joo Kim beat Nelly Korda for the second straight week, pulling away around the turn Sunday and closing with a 3-under 69 for a two-shot victory in the Ford Championship.

title: McDonald's All American girls' game: Saniyah Hall vs. Jerzy Robinson, more to watch
content: From schedules to rosters, to the elite one-on-one matchups, everything to know about the girls' All-Star game.

title: Peyton Manning: Pat Summitt changed my life
content: Legendary NFL quarterback Peyton Manning recounts a career-changing meeting with Pat Summitt that he credits for sparking a lifelong friendship.

title: 2026 World Cup playoffs: Predicting who will claim the final six places
content: The last six World Cup berths will be decided on Tuesday in six winner-take-all games. Which teams will complete the lineup for this summer's finals?

title: Men's tourney: Arizona, Michigan co-title favorites, Wolverines a slight matchup fave
content: The four remaining team's odds to play for and win the men's college basketball national championship.

title: Chase Elliott gambles, outduels Denny Hamlin at Martinsville
content: Chase Elliott outdueled Denny Hamlin at Martinsville Speedway on Sunday, earning his first NASCAR Cup Series victory of the season.

title: Forget luck: Kimi Antonelli shows he's an F1 title threat in Japan
content: Yes, the timing of a safety car helped Kimi Antonelli to Sunday's win at the Japanese GP, but he was still the fastest car on track when it happened.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Atlético want Arsenal's Jesus, Martinelli
content: Could Atlético Madrid offer Gabriel Jesus and Gabriel Martinelli a route out of Arsenal? Plus, Spurs continue their manager search. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Draft guide: Rankings, tips, strategy, stats and more
content: All the rankings, projections, cheat sheets, strategy and analysis you need for the fantasy baseball season.

title: 'Will conclude lovely stay...': Trump threatens to wipe out Iranian energy sites
content: President Trump revealed serious discussions with a "new, more reasonable" Iranian regime, but issued a stark warning: "completely obliterate" Iran's oil facilities, power plants, and Kharg Island if a deal isn't reached soon. He claimed "great progress" in negotiations, while threatening severe retaliation for past Iranian actions.  Tehran, however, denies direct talks.

title: For the first time in IPL history, CSK to play without Dhoni and Raina
content: This match will be the first among 277 T20 games, including 24 in the CLT20, where CSK will not have either Dhoni or Raina in the playing XI. The team has previously played 77 matches without Raina and five without Dhoni, but never without both.

title: Why Google's AI CEO said no to Zuckerberg and yes to Larry Page despite more money
content: Before OpenAI or Anthropic existed, Google and Facebook fought over a small London AI startup called DeepMind. Its CEO Demis Hassabis turned down Mark Zuckerberg's richer offer and sold to Larry Page's Google for $650 million in 2014. A new book by Sebastian Mallaby reveals how a Palo Alto dinner, a poker-style bluff, and AI safety concerns decided everything.

title: Dhurandhar: The Revenge box office collection day 12: Film eyes Rs 1000 crore
content: 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' has officially made history with its day 11 collections. The film enters its second Monday and day 12, today,  March 30, 2026. In a stunning display of box office dominance, the Ranveer Singh starrer has surpassed the lifetime India net of its predecessor, 'Dhurandhar Part 1' with its Rs. 840.20 crore, in just 11 days - a feat that originally took 15 weeks. With a current domestic net of Rs. 848.55 crore and a global gross of Rs. 1,361.95 crore, the Aditya Dhar directorial is now chasing the elite Rs. 1,000 crore India net club.

title: Google founder to employees at town hall: This year a big role will be played by AI agents
content: Google employees are buzzing about Agent Smith, an internal AI tool automating tasks and accessible via mobile. Its popularity led to restricted access, highlighting Google's focus on AI agents for productivity in 2026, as emphasized by cofounder Sergey Brin. AI adoption is becoming mandatory across the company, with usage even impacting performance reviews.

title: Only 5 in 253! Matches MS Dhoni has missed for CSK in IPL
content: Dhoni has long been central to CSK as captain, finisher and wicketkeeper, but this match at the Baraspara Cricket Stadium will go ahead without him. His absence brings focus on the last time he missed a game and how often he has been unavailable since the IPL began in 2008.

title: Microsoft AI CEO reveals what will really decide AI's winners and losers by 2028
content: Microsoft AI CEO Mustafa Suleyman asserts that the AI industry's future hinges on who can afford to run models at scale, not just who builds the smartest ones.  He argues that inference compute scarcity will define winners for the next few years, with high-margin products gaining a significant edge through a data-driven improvement flywheel.

title: Nifty50 ends below 22,350; Sensex plunges over 1,600 points - top reasons for fall
content: Stock market crash today: Nifty50 and BSE Sensex continued their slide on Monday, dropping sharply on negative global cues. While Nifty50 went below 22,350, BSE Sensex closed below 72,000.

title: NFL Trade Rumors: Dolphins, Chargers linked to $24mn 49ers star
content: NFL trade rumors are gaining momentum again as Jauan Jennings is attracting significant trade interest from the Miami Dolphins, Los Angeles Chargers, and Titans, with the 49ers having moved on. Jennings offers a valuable skill set, excelling in red zone situations and contested catches, making him a target for teams seeking dependable receiving options. As of now, Jauan Jennings ' situation is very clear. San Francisco has moved on, and three teams have shown interest. The next step now depends on who decides to act first.

title: Aaron Rodgers Steelers: TJ Watt’s $123mn deal 'not even close'
content: The Pittsburgh Steelers face a significant financial challenge in the 2026 offseason. With T.J. Watt's hefty contract and Aaron Rodgers seeking a substantial raise, the Steelers' cap space is severely strained. Watt's production has declined, raising questions about his value, while Rodgers' strong performance has inflated his market, forcing a tough decision on which star to prioritise. Now, they must choose. Stick with a high-priced defence led by Watt or adjust the books to bring Rodgers back. Either way, the margin for error is gone.

title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi: Can the ‘bindaas’ star avoid second-season blues?
content: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi took the Indian Premier League (IPL) by storm last season, smashing 24 sixes off just 122 balls. In seven matches, he piled up 252 runs at a staggering strike rate of 206.55. Since then, he has continued his explosive form and helped India U-19 win the title. The second-season blues have affected many young stars in the past; the big question remains: will Vaibhav be able to sustain his meteoric rise?

title: IPL 2026: Will rain play spoilsport as RR and CSK begin new era in Guwahati?
content: Guwahati's weather looms large over the IPL 2026 opener between Rajasthan Royals and Chennai Super Kings, with rain forecasts casting doubt on the match. Both teams, aiming for a fresh start after poor seasons, feature significant player and leadership changes. Sanju Samson moves to CSK, Ravindra Jadeja to RR, and Riyan Parag captains the Royals, while Ruturaj Gaikwad leads CSK.

title: Homeless at 15, how this poor girl made it to Harvard and beyond
content: Liz Murray's journey from homelessness in the Bronx to graduating from Harvard is a testament to unwavering determination. Facing immense hardship and personal tragedy, she channeled her struggles into a fierce drive for education, completing high school in two years and earning a place at an Ivy League institution.

title: 'Beginning of whistle revolution': TVK chief Vijay launches assembly poll campaign in Chennai
content: TVK president Vijay commenced his election campaign from Perambur in Chennai. He criticized Chief Minister M K Stalin regarding an increase in crime and a deteriorating law and order situation. Vijay stated that the current administration has failed to ensure basic safety for citizens. He urged voters to support the TVK's whistle symbol, calling the election a 'whistle revolution'.

title: 'Modi controls Kerala CM': Rahul counterattacks Vijayan with same BJP 'B-team' barb
content: Kerala's political landscape is dominated by accusations of being the "BJP B team." Rahul Gandhi claims the LDF is BJP-backed, while CM Pinarayi Vijayan labels the UDF as the "BJP B team." Rahul criticizes the LDF as a corporate-funded government, alleging BJP control over Kerala's leadership and highlighting the Sabarimala gold theft.

title: 5 IPL records that look impossible to break, but not for Vaibhav Sooryavanshi
content: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi has been on a record-breaking/setting spree over the last year or so and, as he prepares for his second IPL season, expectations are sky-high from the 15-year-old boy wonder.  So ,what can we expect from Sooryavanshi in his second season? A lot - plus these five iconic IPL records, which were once thought unbeatable, could very well fall to the 15-year-old teenager.

title: How a village potter invented a refrigerator that works without electricity
content: A Gujarati potter, Mansukhbhai Prajapati, revolutionized rural India with his electricity-free clay refrigerator. Born from the aftermath of the 2001 earthquake, this innovative device uses evaporation to keep food and water cool for days. Priced affordably, it offers a vital solution for households facing power cuts and limited resources, proving that practical innovation can emerge from traditional skills.

title: Dual-airport strategy in Delhi, Mumbai signals India's aviation boom
content: India's aviation landscape is undergoing a significant transformation, shifting from single, overburdened airports to a dual-airport model in major cities like Delhi-NCR and Mumbai. This strategic move aims to alleviate congestion, foster economic growth, and position India as a global aviation hub, mirroring international standards and preparing for a future of mass air travel.

title: SSC CPO result 2026: Delhi Police SI cut-off, PET/PST list out
content: SSC CPO Result 2026: The Staff Selection Commission (SSC) has declared the SSC CPO 2025 Paper-I result for Sub-Inspector posts in Delhi Police and CAPFs. Candidates shortlisted for PET/PST have been listed category-wise with cut-off marks for female, male, and Delhi Police departmental candidates. The exam was held in December 2025, and results are based on normalized scores. Shortlisted candidates will now appear for physical tests, with schedules to be released soon on the official SSC website.

title: 'BJP deceived people of Bihar': Tejashwi Yadav on CM Nitish Kumar's resignation as MLC
content: Rashtriya Janata Dal leader Tejashwi Yadav accused the BJP of deceiving Nitish Kumar and the people of Bihar by removing him as Chief Minister. This comes as Nitish Kumar and BJP's Nitin Nabin resigned from their state legislature seats after being elected to the Rajya Sabha, a mandatory step.

title: Cameron Green workload row: Who calls the shots, KKR or Cricket Australia?
content: Cameron Green's massive INR 25.20 crore IPL price tag is under scrutiny as he's unavailable to bowl due to a lower back injury. Cricket Australia clarified KKR knew of the situation, sparking debate about player workload management and franchise rights versus national board control. This situation has left KKR struggling with team balance.

title: DIY decor: Art expert reveals budget-friendly home projects going viral
content: Art expert spills the beans on 5 budget-friendly DIY decor trends that are a rage this year, focusing on budget-friendly, photogenic and easily replicable projects. Peel-and-stick transformations, personalised wall art, colour-led hacks, upcycled vintage furniture and small-space glow-ups are highlighted as key trends. These accessible projects empower anyone to creatively transform their living spaces.

title: Rupee hits record low: Currency falls past 95 against US dollar
content: The Indian rupee saw a significant rebound, gaining 128 paise to 93.57 against the US dollar following RBI's directive to limit banks' currency exposure. This move prompts banks to reduce dollar holdings, offering temporary support.

title: Visakhapatnam horror: Navy staffer kills woman, dismembers body, stores remains in fridge
content: A shocking incident unfolded in Vizag as a Naval technician allegedly murdered his girlfriend, dismembered her body, and disposed of some parts. The accused surrendered to police after confessing to the brutal crime. Investigators recovered some body parts from his refrigerator, but the head remains missing, prompting a dedicated search.

title: 'KKR fully aware': Cricket Australia forced to clarify on Green after Rahane's 'ask CA' jibe
content: Cricket Australia clarified Cameron Green's inability to bowl for Kolkata Knight Riders in IPL 2026, citing a lower back injury. This came after KKR skipper Ajinkya Rahane's pointed remarks about the Australian board. Green is undergoing managed rehabilitation and is expected to resume bowling in 10-12 days, with KKR fully informed.

title: Prakash Raj's mother passes away at the age of 86
content: Veteran actor Prakash Raj's mother, Swarnalatha, has passed away at the age of 86. She died at the actor's residence after a brief illness. Swarnalatha was a strong support in Prakash Raj's life and career. The film industry mourns this personal loss. Many actors and filmmakers have offered their condolences. Her final rites were held in Bengaluru.

title: 'Dubai could be blown up': US economic expert flags risks for UAE if it enters Iran war
content: Top US economist Jeffrey Sachs warned the UAE that its alignment with the US and Israel could expose Dubai and Abu Dhabi to serious threats if it enters the ongoing Iran war. He criticized the Abraham Accords as an "invitation for disaster," arguing that overreliance on American security guarantees is a dangerous miscalculation for the Gulf nation.

title: Lok Sabha passes Bill to amend Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code; here's what it means
content: The Lok Sabha has approved the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code (Amendment) Bill, 2025, a move lauded by Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman for revitalizing India's banking sector. The amendments aim to expedite case admissions and curb system misuse, building on the IBC's success in resolving over half of stressed assets and improving corporate governance for rescued firms.

title: Water discovery fuels return to Moon
content: Four astronauts are set to launch on a historic lunar mission, marking humanity's return to the Moon after over 50 years. This revival of crewed lunar exploration was significantly fueled by the discovery of water by India's Chandrayaan-1, which reignited global interest and provided crucial scientific justification for future missions.

title: Andhra Pradesh govt. launches special drives after Markapuram accident
content: 976 buses inspected, 193 booked; checks intensified at 16 points, zero tolerance for violations: Transport Minister

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly elections: Full list of TVK candidates
content: Polling for all the 234 constituencies in Tamil Nadu is scheduled to be held in a single phase on April 23, 2026

title: Promises delivered and undelivered during 5 years of DMK government
content: The govt. introduced schemes that did not figure in its manifesto, even while delivering key assurances such as Kalaignar Magalir Urimai Thittam and free bus travel; but it has not formulated the Higher Education policy, set up Kalaignar Canteens or created special courts for corruption cases

title: Hoteliers flag shortage of commercial LPG cylinders
content: Members of the Kalaburagi District Hotel, Bakery and Lodge Owners Association say they will protest if action is not taken soon

title: Telangana Assembly adopts resolutions condemning West Asia war, seeking ban on herbicide
content: Members express concern over the increasing deaths of farmers, farmworkers after accidental, intentional consumption of the weedicide

title: Evading notice under BNSS can constitute valid grounds for arrest: Karnataka High Court
content: When the accused would not cooperate with receiving the notice or otherwise, the accused would become open to arrest, the court says

title: State govt. partners with Central agencies to provide energy-efficient appliances to five lakh PMAY beneficiaries
content: Each beneficiary to receive LED bulbs, tubelights and BLDC fans; scheme to cut electricity bills and CO2 emissions, says official

title: Suvendu Adhikari files nomination from Nandigram, says BJP will register decisive victory in Bengal
content: The BJP has fielded him from the two seats in a high-profile electoral battle against the ruling Trinamool Congress

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: Preparations underway to ensure flawless surveillance of sensitive booths in Kozhikode
content: The list of sensitive and critical polling stations will be released soon to intensify safety measures with the support of the Central Armed Police Forces

title: Delimitation row: Revanth Reddy wants current gap in seats be maintained, as 50% increase in Lok Sabha seats will leave South at a disadvantage
content: If the 50% model is applied uniformly, the five southern States collectively would gain aroud 66 seats, while Hindi-belt and northern States, would see a rise of roughly 142 seats, Mr. Reddy said

title: Mediation key to reducing court cases, ensuring timely justice says judge
content: Principal District and Sessions Judge K.G. Shanti was speaking after launching a training programme for new mediators in Ballari

title: Focus on GP-level indicators, indices at review meeting on DHDR in Bidar
content: Discussions centred on streamlining data collection and finalising key indicators essential for assessing human development at the grassroots level

title: Earliest Census data to be available in 2027; first phase to start from April 1: RGI
content: The Registrar General and Census Commissioner of India says that India’s villages have decreased by over 1000 compared to 2011

title: Parliament Budget Session LIVE: Those advocating Maoism should know that people who take up arms will have to pay a price, says Amit Shah in LS
content: Congress MP Digvijaya Singh says CAPF Bill will make the discriminations faced by the officials permanent as RS takes up discussion on CAPF (General Administration) Bill, 2026 for consideration and passing

title: Secretive jungle cats need habitats outside protected areas: study
content: A new study’s finding that jungle cats use agricultural landscapes aligns with previous knowledge of the species. In and around farms, these cats keep rodent populations in check, thus ‘protecting’ crops. However, these landscapes lie outside protected areas and harbour several threats, including fragmented habitats and speeding vehicles

title: Assembly Elections LIVE: Everyone working hard for BJP-NDA hat-trick in Assam, says PM Modi
content: In Kerala, Rahul Gandhi says UDF is fighting the State election "against the LDF, which is fully supported by the BJP"

title: Congress flags Registrar General’s remarks, says no reason for “bulldozing” Constitution amendment bills
content: Census Commissioner Mritunjay Kumar Narayan urges people to give accurate information to Census enumerators

title: BJP seeks campaign ban on West Bengal CM Mamata Banerjee over alleged MCC violations
content: A delegation comprising Union Ministers Piyush Goyal, Kiren Rijiju, and Sukanta Majumdar among others submitted the complaint to the Election Commission; the party accused Ms. Banerjee of making ‘grave and disturbing public statements’ during multiple public rallies in Bengal, ‘posing a serious threat to free, fair and peaceful elections’

title: Improvement in manufacturing keeps IIP growth steady at 5.2% in February
content: The National Statistics Office revised the industrial production growth for January 2026 to 5.1% from the provisional estimate of 4.8% released earlier this month

title: FCRA amendment: Kerala CM Pinarayi Vijayan writes to PM Modi
content: In his letter, Mr. Vijayan stated that the proposed amendments have generated apprehensions among minority communities and demanded that they be withdrawn

title: Sitharaman defends IBC citing higher recoveries and post-resolution performance of firms
content: Replying to the debate on the Insolvency and Bankruptcy (Amendment) Bill 2026 in Lok Sabha, the Finance Minister said the reason for bringing in IBC was not debt recovery, but rather the rescue of viable businesses and addressing their financial stress

title: Telangana Govt plans regulatory authority like EAGLE and HYDRAA to curb food adulteration: CM
content: People are increasingly worried about the large-scale adulteration of food products, which is leading to unexplained and dangerous diseases, says the Chief Minister

title: DGP declares A.P. as Naxal-free State, after CPI-Maoist CCM, eight other Naxalites surrender before police
content: Chelluri Narayana Rao alias Suresh was involved in killing of MLA Kidari Sarveswara Rao and CI Muddada Gandhi, says DGP Harish Kumar Gupta

title: T. Rajhentherr moves Madras HC alleging copyright infringement of songs composed for Uyir Ulla Varai Usha
content: He had written the script and screenplay, directed, acted, composed songs, and penned the lyrics, too, for the 1983 blockbuster movie

title: Bill to ensure social security and welfare for gig workers passed in Telangana Assembly
content: As per the bill, aggregators must contribute 1 to 2% of their transaction value to a State-managed welfare fund

title: Deputy Commissioner of Commercial Tax GST caught taking ₹6 lakh bribe by Karnataka Lokayukta
content: The complainant had approached the Lokayukta alleging that a GST officer had demanded a bribe to clear a pending tax-related matter

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: Bitter battle for nine seats that can turn electoral fortunes
content: The LDF, the UDF and the NDA are locked in three-cornered fights in the constituencies of Nemom, Kazhakkoottam, Vattiyoorkkavu, Aranmula, Pala, Thrissur, Nattika, Palakkad and Manjeshwaram. The outcomes from these seats could even determine the final outcome of the polls.

title: NDA, Opposition spar in LS over efforts to free country of Maoism
content: While Shiv Sena pointed out that the red corridor has shrunk significantly due to the policies of the NDA govt and the previous UPA regime was helpless, the Congress hit back saying it was the UPA that launched Operation Green Hunt and had created the Commando Battalion for Resolute Action (CoBRA) to deal with Maoist threat; Union Home Minister Amit Shah had announced that Maoist menace would be completely eliminated by March 31, 2026

title: Kerala polls: On SDPI votes, CPI’s Binoy Viswam says party hasn’t explicitly rejected any and ‘all votes welcome’
content: Rejecting allegations of CPI(M)-BJP deal, Viswam says ‘the real understanding’ is between BJP and Congress

title: Vijay follows footsteps of Tamil Nadu politicians with a penchant for dual contests
content: TVK leader to contest two urban seats in debut election; precedent set by Jayalalithaa, who once contested four seats; PT, DMK, Congress leaders have also attempted dual contests, with less than stellar results

title: Retired Army Brigadier shot dead during morning walk in Uttarakhand
content: According to officials, firing broke out during an argument between people travelling in two vehicles, and a stray bullet hit the Brigadier while he was out for a walk

title: State government committed to providing jobs, says Minister
content: Minister Bharath Gupta said job melas would be organised every three months and asked the youth to make best use of the opportunities provided

title: Per capita spending varies by 2.5 times across Bengaluru corporations: Report
content: The per capita outlay refers to the amount a corporation is spending on an individual in its jurisdiction

title: KSCA to conduct open selection trials for Mysuru zone in April to identify talented young cricketers
content: The initiative aims to provide aspiring players an opportunity to showcase their skills and gain professional training under the academy system

title: Kerala polls: No need for concern for churches over proposed FCRA amendments, says BJP leader Shone George
content: BJP Kerala vice-president and NDA candidate from Pala constituency says some NGOs had received foreign funds for ‘anti-national activities’ and that the proposed amendments were aimed at targeting such groups

title: Fish farmers complain of being overlooked in tender for fishing rights in Shivamogga district of Karnataka
content: The fish farmers suspect favouritism, but officials say the oversight was due to the process being conducted by a different department

title: Lok Sabha passes insolvency law amendments; Sitharaman says Bill will help maximise value for stakeholders
content: Piloting the bill in the Lok Sabha, the Finance Minister said that 12 amendments are being made in the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code (IBC), which came into force in 2016, that would help maximise the value for stakeholders and improve the governing process itself

title: Sonia Gandhi shows 'excellent progress', discharge expected soon, say doctors
content: Sonia Gandhi, admitted to Sir Ganga Ram Hospital on March 24, shows excellent health improvement; doctors anticipate her discharge soon after responding well to treatment

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Poll promises may hit the coffers hard
content: While campaigning, LDF is highlighting welfare measures such as increased pensions and monthly wages implemented by the government. UDF has promised five basic ‘welfare guarantees,’ including raising welfare pensions to ₹3,000 if it comes to power. Experts question the rationale of such promises, given the huge cost involved in implementing and sustaining them

title: GBA budget: How Bengaluru’s new corporations differ in what they earn and spend
content: Property tax contributes 51% of its own source revenue in East and 42% in Central, but drops to around 34–37% in North, West and South

title: Assam saw long span of instability, but things changed in past decade: PM Modi
content: PM Modi was addressing the BJP’s booth level workers in poll-bound Assam as part of thne ‘Mera Booth, Sabse Mazboot Samvaad’

title: Maoist Violence Down 82%, Deaths 90%, But Red Corridor Fight Not Yet Over
content: Government data accessed by NDTV shows that Maoist insurgency has been pushed to its weakest level in more than two decades--though not entirely extinguished.

title: After Pakistan's Claims On Middle East Mediation, Iran's Blunt Rejection
content: The Consulate General of Iran in Mumbai stated on Monday that there have been no direct talks with the US, only excessive and unreasonable demands passed through intermediaries.

title: Top Karnataka GST Officer Busted While Allegedly Taking Bribe Of Rs 6 Lakh
content: It is alleged that the 48-year-old accused officer demanded a bribe of Rs 10 lakh to settle the matter, which was later negotiated down to Rs 6 lakh.

title: Is That Kash Patel Seen Dancing In Viral Leaked Video? A Fact-Check
content: The controversy began after a group calling itself Handala Hack' claimed responsibility for breaching Patel's private emails.

title: 8 Locations, 33 Questions: India's First Digital Census To Begin Wednesday
content: The questionnaire in Phase 1 includes building identification, ownership status, number of residents, water and sanitation facilities, married couples, digital and transport assets

title: Tears, Hugs, Politics: Vijay Comforts Ex-Driver's Son Named TVK Candidate
content: Actor-turned-politician Vijay found himself consoling his party's Villivakkam candidate Sabarinathan, who broke down on stage as his name was announced

title: Manufacturing Drives India's Industrial Output Growth To 5.2% In February
content: The National Statistics Office (NSO) revised the industrial production growth for January 2026 to 5.1 per cent from the provisional estimate of 4.8 per cent released earlier this month.

title: Opinion: Opinion | Why This Is The Most 'Deceptive' Point Of The US-Iran War - Yet
content: This is coercive bargaining under continuing fire. Every side is trying to improve its position before the next move.

title: How Trump's War In Iran Can Lead To More Nukes In The World
content: Now, it is not just Iran's nuclear programme that will be a threat to the US and the world. It will likely release a nuclear genie that will be hard to put back in the bottle.

title: Trump's Ballroom With 'Stairs To Nowhere' Red-Flagged By Architects
content: Trump has outlined plans for the new White House ballroom, saying the project will address space constraints during official events and feature bulletproof and drone-resistant design elements.

title: "Dubai Could Be Blown Up If UAE Enters War," Warns Top US Economist
content: Top US economist Economist Jeffrey Sachs warns UAE against war involvement risking Dubai and Abu Dhabi.

title: Parliament Live Updates: Union Minister Amit Shah To Address Lok Sabha
content: Amit Shah is scheduled to address the Lok Sabha at 4:30 PM to provide updates on the anti-maoist operations and the roadmap for long-term peace in affected regions.

title: NDTV On Ground Zero: Israel Steps Up Lebanon Strike, Hezbollah Fights On
content: Over the past 24 hours, nine health workers and a member of the UN peacekeeping force are among the several people killed in the fresh wave of attacks in Lebanon

title: Have You Missed The Bus To Jewar Airport, Or Is Property Still A Smart Buy
content: With the inauguration of Noida International Airport, years of anticipation along the Yamuna Expressway have turned into a visible, operating reality.

title: 'You Can't Be Attached To Your Reputation': Judge's Dig At Aniruddhacharya

title: News: Concern for Carlos Estevez as Royals' closer blows save
